text: In the first scene, I sense an uncanny stillness—the dim industrial hallway, the closed glass doors, the looming shadows. I feel small against the silence and the architecture, a flâneur pondering the threshold between emptiness and purpose. In the next, vibrant color and text invite me toward curiosity, the spirit of research and development almost tangible. It awakens a spark in me, the excitement of inquiry, yet the subdued lighting suggests secrecy and unfinished thought. Here I am, between darkness and potential discoveries, influenced equally by solitude and intellectual possibility.
